category.scope_note: Air-source heat pumps and split-type air conditioners, residential and light commercial, exported from China to Nigeria

title.en: China-to-Nigeria Air-source Heat Pump Compliance Gap Matrix
title.zh: 中国空气源热泵进入尼日利亚：合规差距矩阵
title.zht: 中國空氣源熱泵進入尼日利亞：合規差距矩陣

description.en: Informational comparison of China baseline obligations and Nigeria market requirements for air-source heat pumps entering Nigeria through SON product certification, NAFDAC chemical controls, NERC and ECN energy programmes, FCCPC consumer protections, and EMC or safety frameworks.
description.zh: 对比中国基础要求与尼日利亚市场要求，用于评估中国空气源热泵进入尼日利亚时的合规差距，涵盖SON产品认证、NAFDAC化学管制、NERC与ECN能效要求、FCCPC消费者保护以及电磁和安全体系。
description.zht: 對比中國基礎要求與尼日利亞市場要求，用於評估中國空氣源熱泵進入尼日利亞時的合規差距，涵蓋SON產品認證、NAFDAC化學管制、NERC與ECN能效要求、FCCPC消費者保護以及電磁和安全體系。

disclaimer.en: This page is informational only and is not a legal opinion, official clearance, customs declaration, or market-approval certificate. Exporters and importers should verify current SON, NAFDAC, NERC, FCCPC, NS, and NCC obligations with local advisors before production, shipment, sale, and installation.
disclaimer.zh: 本页仅供参考，不构成法律意见、官方放行、报关申报结论或市场准入批准文件。出口商与进口商应在生产、出运、销售及安装前，向尼日利亚本地专业顾问核实SON、NAFDAC、NERC、FCCPC、NS和NCC的最新义务要求。
disclaimer.zht: 本頁僅供參考，不構成法律意見、官方放行、報關申報結論或市場准入批准文件。出口商與進口商應在生產、出運、銷售及安裝前，向尼日利亞本地專業顧問核實SON、NAFDAC、NERC、FCCPC、NS和NCC的最新義務要求。

answer_first.en: Nigeria entry for Chinese air-source heat pumps focuses on SON MANCAP certification or equivalent conformity, FCCPC and NAFDAC coordination, and NERC/ECN energy labelling expectations, while NCC applies to wireless and EMC-related functions and Nigeria uses 240 V 50 Hz infrastructure.
answer_first.zh: 中国空气源热泵进入尼日利亚的核心是满足SON MANCAP类认证或等效符合性义务、协调FCCPC与NAFDAC要求，并确认NERC与ECN能效标签规定；NCC覆盖无线和EMC相关功能，电气运行基准为50赫兹240伏。
answer_first.zht: 中國空氣源熱泵進入尼日利亞的核心是滿足SON MANCAP類認證或等效符合性義務、協調FCCPC與NAFDAC要求，並確認NERC與ECN能效標籤規定；NCC覆蓋無線及EMC相關功能，電氣運行基準為50赫茲240伏。

editorial_controls.change_policy: Keep source links, regulator names, and mandatory flags synchronized with Nigeria and China primary sources before human review.
